review_title: Within 3 months all the zippers broke.
review_text: For the ridiculous amount of money Lululemon charges for their products they use by far the cheapest closures I've every seen. Through normal use after 3 months, 2 of the 3 sweatshirts she spent her birthday and Christmas gift money on no longer zip closed. The zipper pulls from the pockets broke off first, then one pocket's zipper's teeth misaligned so it will no longer unzip, and finally the main front zipper's cheap plastic stop completely came off so there is no way to zip it up. Shameful.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_title: Bad zipper, loose stitching, and beaded up stitch
review_text: I just left a review and wanted to add that not only are the sleeves balling up at the stitch line, loose ends of stitching, the zipper is also janky. It catches alot and seems like it will likely not last. Quality does not align with the price.

review_text: As a loyal lulu follower for over 15 years, spending thousands of dollars annually, this jacket has been my biggest disappointment. After only a few wears, the defective seam near where the cuffin and thumb hole meet, created a hole. Over the years, I have had countless other styles and materials (Rulu, Luon, etc) with cuffins and never had issues. It’ll be a pass on the Nulu for me moving forward, especially now that lulu is no longer standing by their products either.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: 2 days later went to wear it. On route to lululemon I noticed there was a large water stain on the hand cuff (see photo). This is the 3rd item I have purchased with water stains. I asked lululemon to return the item for me in store. They said NO that I had to go home wash &dry the item then bring it back. I asked the manager if this was all in the return policy and he said it was. It states “unwashed and unworn”!! They returned it for me after wasting my time & gas money $128 later
business_insight: Support or resolution issue affecting trust and loyalty.

review_text: The Nulu Define Jacket is very slimming and flattering. I bought the light pink (“strawberry milkshake”) one for my daughter’s birthday at the end of the summer and she loved it so much that she requested another one for Christmas (a grey-blue one with gold accents). So, why am I only giving three stars to an item that we liked so much that we ended up repurchasing? Because it doesn’t last. Despite us washing the jacket exactly as per the instructions on the tag, the fabric pilled after only a few washes. It also stained very easily. The pictures of the light pink jacket here enclosed are after five months of normal wear. I would not have repurchased it myself, but my daughter loves the look of this jacket so much that in the end the purchase was worth it.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_title: Serious quality issues and NO customer service
review_text: Serious quality issue. Stitching coming undone on sleeves and multiple pulls throughout different areas of the jacket (not pulling but pulls of fabric coming through!). All of this after literally wearing the jacket for an hour TOPS and not even washing it yet!! The worst part is the customer service. It’s been 11 days about my inquiry into the fabric quality and there has been NO reply whatsoever. I’ve followed up and get a run around message of asking for the same details over and over again without committing to any sort of reply. I otherwise love the jacket and want a resolution but it’s seriously been the customer service (or complete LACK of) that has me flabbergasted and speaks to the apparent “integrity” of this company.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: This is the 3rd piece of brand now clothing I've purchased from lululemon that has come damaged due to poor quality. Put this jacket on and my husband told me one of the seams had separated revealing a small hole. Ive had this issue before with either that or threads and stitching pulling off as well.
business_insight: Construction quality issue may undermine perceived craftsmanship.

review_text: The jacket was great it’s the delivery company that threw me off the guy came to my door with blood on the package and it was open at the bottom some how it got on the jacket and I washed it . It was fine but the delivery company is really odd I didn’t seem to have this problem with the bag I got
business_insight: Post-purchase delivery problem affecting customer experience.

review_title: Beautiful jacket but does not hold up
review_text: i love the look of this jacket and was obsessed with the pink color and rose gold zipper! But I have had this jacket less than a month and have washed it twice - cold, delicate, by itself, and hung to dry. It has seams ripping and pilling in multiple places.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_title: Too expensive to be falling apart.
review_text: Im giving this 3 stars only because it is sooo cute, extremely soft and comfortable and it truly fits really well. However, I only got to wear it ONE time to the gym before it was noticeably damaged. Isnt wearing it to the gym how its intended to be worn? I would get this again but I will never work out in it again. Stick to just walking or running in it. The stitches and inseams seem to be easily messed up as well.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.

review_text: I was very excited when the white and gold Nulu jacket was in stock. I’d been eyeballing it forever. After minimal wear and only one wash where I hung to dry, there is already noticeable pilling. I have taken excellent care of this jacket and have the black and gold nulu that I’ve had for years that has zero pilling. I’m not sure what makes this one different, but to say I’ve worn less than ten times (likely less) the pilling is unacceptable for the price.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: I bought this sweater less than 2 months ago and have worn it under 3 times. I followed the care instructions exactly, yet the seams are unravelling and it’s pilling like crazy. For nearly $160 in Ontario, Canada, this quality is completely unacceptable. The stitching looks cheap and rushed, and the fabric already feels worn out. I’m genuinely disappointed. Lululemon’s quality has gone downhill, and it’s horrific for this price point.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: I bought this define jacket online during the Black Friday sale. It was shipped from a store (Red Deer, Alberta) and arrived with several stains. The define jackets are fantastic but it’s incredibly disappointing when you receive a dirty/stained item. It’s especially noticeable on the blush pink. I’m not sure why it was sent looking like that. This was purchased as a Christmas gift for my daughter and I’m glad I looked at it and saw this before wrapping it up!
business_insight: Fulfillment or inspection quality-control issue.

review_title: Comfy but Not What I Expected
review_text: I ordered this jacket in “Porcelain Pink” as it was on sale and the color was cute. Unfortunately, the color is not as pictured—the picture looks like a soft petal pink, but is undeniably pink; the product I received has more of a purple/mauve tone. It’s still very pretty, but I feel the picture is the listing is misleading. Additionally, I have only worn the item once in the week that I’ve had it (and haven’t even washed it yet), but the fabric on the left breast is already pilling and has a patchy texture. Despite the misleading picture, I’m satisfied with the lilac-ish color of the product, and I find it to be just as comfortable and soft as my other define jackets, but I’m just disappointed that this product isn’t holding up well.
business_insight: Mismatch between expectation and product presentation may reduce purchase confidence.

review_title: DO NOT BUY WALNUT CRUNCH WITHOUT CHECKING IN STORE
review_text: This was my 5th set in the last 30 days but now I’ll never buy lulu again. The walnut crunch define jacket and leggings are completely different colors (leggings are basically olive and the top is a pure brown) but because I already took the tag off (I assumed they would be perfect like my other sets and immediately ripped the tags) they refuse to refund or exchange.
business_insight: Support or resolution issue affecting trust and loyalty.

I’m so disappointed as this jacket looks so cute and fits nice, but it’s simply not worth the price as the quality is bad

review_title: Worse fit and less durable than old version.
review_text: The new "improved" version is a major downgrade from the previous version. The liner is looser, so my phone bounces around in the liner pocket more. The liner is less durable and the has a huge hole after several months of use. I have 4 older pairs of pacebreakers that do not have these issues and have yet to rip. Even the new drawstring is somehow worse and doesn't stay as tight. I do not recommend anyone purchase these for running.
business_insight: Design choice or feature limitation may be frustrating customers.

review_title: Not the quality they use to be!

I had to have the new light blue ones and purchased them in store on 1/16/24 and they are not the same quality as my other pairs. After only one wear to the gym a strand of thread on one of the legs basically ran like a pair of nylons and now they look terrible and I bet they rip soon. I would not recommend.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.

review_title: Low quality compared to older pairs
review_text: I just recieved these shorts and wore them for the 1st time today in a workout using a barbell. The quality has significantly reduced compared to previous pairs that I've owned and I'm pretty disappointed. The shorts fell completely apart where the barbell made contact (see attached images). My previous pairs have been through 100s of barbell workouts without issue. This isn't acceptable, especially considering the price point.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: My husband had these shorts for 4 months and they completely ripped at the liner from doing a squat.

review_title: Poor Durability – Lining Ripped During Second Run
review_text: I own another pair of Lululemon lined shorts that I really liked, I ran a marathon in them a few years ago, and I continue to wear them to this day. So with another marathon coming up, I decided to get a new pair of the Pace Breaker Lined Short 7". Unfortunately, after just two runs, the lining ripped, leaving a large hole in the crotch area. The first run was just an easy run to test them out, but during the marathon, the tear caused a lot of chafing, making the rest of the run uncomfortable and the recovery worse. For shorts marketed for “running and training,” I expected better durability. These didn’t hold up like my previous pair, and I wouldn’t recommend them for long-distance running.
business_insight: Construction quality issue may undermine perceived craftsmanship.

review_title: LOVE the fit! BUMMED about the quality
review_text: These shorts look and feel really great! I have two pairs and wear them daily. However, be warned about the liner because I haven’t had these long and the liner already has major holes in them (see pics), which is a massive bummer. These are probably the comfiest shorts I run in but the quick wear-and-tear has me discouraged. Might be better going linerless with something higher underneath them.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.

review_title: I would recommend another lined short…
review_text: I bought these about 8 months ago. I wear them once a week to the gym and for running. I washed and dried them like they said. I submitted something about a month or so ago to their customer team because the elastic was coming out and there were holes starting to form. The pictures are current and I was told that it’s normal for the liner to start getting holes in them like this. I’ve had Chubbies Shorts for about a year longer and they don’t have any signs of this. Buy another brand, not these.
business_insight: Construction quality issue may undermine perceived craftsmanship.

review_title: Arm hole stretched out when perspiring
review_text: Luckily, the company returned my item, even though I wore it once and washed it. The material was so thin that it stretched out too much.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_title: Loved the fit but the quality is not there
review_text: I purchased this and loved it as soon as I tried it on. Then I took it for its maiden voyage - a 5 mile run. At the end of the run, I looked down and the material had a run in it. I hadn’t washed it, or done anything but run. When I reached out to lululemon they told me this was “normal wear and tear” and I could not exchange it for another. I have never had any other lululemon tops look like this after one run. If this is how this top looks so soon after purchasing it, it’s a no for me.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_title: Reduced priced charged full price on this item
review_text: Beware when you buy this item. I was charged full price for this top and when the product arrived the tag had lower price on it. Getting the price adjustment took forever! Really disappointed with lululemon customer service too!
business_insight: Support or resolution issue affecting trust and loyalty.

review_text: I have a dozen sculpt tanks prior to this new version in every colour. The quality of construction is very disappointing in this version. The darts along the front leaves a bulky excess on the wrong side and the surging quality is also bulky and lifts ups on the wrong side. The old version is seamless and smooth along every single seam. You could mistakenly wear it inside out easily. The head opening is markedly smaller leaving it tight at the neckline compared to the old version.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.

review_text: This is my first time being a lulu too and will definitely be my last. My top had snags all over after washing as instructed and Lulu didn’t honor their quality promise when I reached out to them.
business_insight: Construction quality issue may undermine perceived craftsmanship.

review_text: Ordered online and shirt was delivered with stains all over it. Very disappointing. I returned. I hoped to reorder, but it was sold out. Expected better quality for a $58 shirt.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.

review_title: Great Tank But Wrinkles Too Easily
review_text: The tank itself is great; flowy, breathable material, good fit. However, I had to steam it for the first use and hoped that the fabric would hold. Learned that it has to be steamed or ironed after every wash. I’m not obsessive about wrinkles but it’s virtually unwearable after a wash. This is a miss considering you will likely wash it after each use.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.
